summary: As of Feb 5 2026: 733 cases. Rate ~24/day. SC outbreak (933 total) decelerating. FL Ave Maria outbreak (54 cases). 2025 full year was 2,276.
content:
CDC data timeline for 2026:
- Jan 23: 416 cumulative (CDC)
- Jan 30: 588 cumulative (CDC)  
- Feb 5: 733 cumulative (CDC)
- Rate: ~24 cases/day nationally, remarkably stable

SC outbreak: Started Oct 2025, 933 total as of Feb 10 (includes 2025 cases). Decelerating from 22/day to 3/day at state level. 96% in Spartanburg County.

FL Ave Maria University: 54 cases, appears nearly contained.

Key: National rate stable despite SC deceleration → non-SC sources increasing.

2025 comparison: 2,276 full year, 49 outbreaks. 2026 on track for much higher.

Projection range: Median ~2,300 by April 30, P10~1,550, P90~4,000.
